title: Sharing streaming tables and materialized views is GA
body:
Using Delta Sharing to share streaming tables and materialized views is generally available. There are fewer limitations for share recipients and providers when sharing streaming tables and materialized views.

See [Add streaming tables to a share](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#streaming-tables), [Add materialized views to a share](/aws/en/opensharing/create-share#materialized-views), and [Read shared streaming tables and materialized views](/aws/en/opensharing/read-data-databricks#st-and-mv).

ref_links.text: Add streaming tables to a share
Add materialized views to a share
Read shared streaming tables and materialized views
